custom.description: A Zotero 7 plugin that minimizes Zotero to the system tray instead of closing it completely. Keep your reference manager running quietly in the background without cluttering your taskbar.
Zotero Review Assistant is a Zotero plugin that aims to streamline the process of organizing articles for review research.
zotero connects to excalidraw
Plugin that tallies citation counts for Zotero items.
Simple plugin for limiting maximum number of open tabs in Zotero.
A Zotero plugin that automatically retrieves and updates paper metadata from multiple academic sources based on paper titles.
A plugin for Zotero. Perform operations to execute custom commands.
Pin items in your collections in Zotero so they always appear at the top.
Easily see how many annotations your Zotero items have
a ODH wrapper for Zotero
A Zotero plugin that provides the PolarRec service within the Zotero UI.
A plugin for summarizing and indexing annotations in Zotero
Zotero plugin for note management. Helping you visualize your notes and annotations efficiently.
Tab Enhance is a Zotero 7 plugin that adds more convenient features to Zotero tabs.
A lightweight Zotero plugin , only for setting your PDF view as defaults. Such as hand tool, scroll mode, and zoom mode.
Attachment scanner (for Zotero v.7.0+)
Zotero plugin that eliminates the tedious task of adding the book information separately when adding a chapter from the RI OPAC.
A Zotero plugin that downloads DigiVatLib manuscripts for you.
Use categorial tags to better manage tags.
This is a tool used to generate a review based on the relevant literature provided by users.
A Zotero plugin to rename PDF files
This Zotero addon provides statics of authors and simplifies viewing items of designated author in a Zotero library.
Nutstore sso plugin for Zotero
Zotero addon to automatically fetch TL;DR from Sematic scholar for items.
Plugin for zotero to retrieve reference data from Semantic Scholar API and add them to your library
Zotero plugin for quick access to paper CCF rating, conference/journal, and citation count.
A plugin for Zotero to automatically retrieve citation, official code link, conference, related papers and so on.
KeepZotero is a zotero plugin to keep zotero in taskbar by changing close to minimize
Status monitoring and analysis tool for Zotero.
A Zotero plugin to export notes to Trillium notes
Zotero 6 plugin to enable batch editing for multiple items' fields
Zotero plugin to change title case
Backup Plugin for Zotero
ZoteroFields Plugin for Zotero
Zotero plugin/addon to automatically include the name of the currently selected collection as a tag to a new item.
Plugin to add a "Special Tags" column into Zotero where you can display specific, pre-defined tags
Zotero plugin for auto-fetching citation counts from various sources
Zotero plugin, fetching publication metadata and cite counts (w/ and w/o self citations) from the INSPIRE-HEP database (and CrossRef cite counts for papers in other fields)
ZotMeta is a Zotero plugin to update existing articles/books metadata.
WIP - Updates the User PDF file metadata when title or author is changed
Tracks your research activities, creates detailed timelines, and exports notes to platforms like Flomo.
Plugin to show if references in Zotero have PubPeer comments
ZoteroTheme Plugin
Zotero显示CCF分区，JCR分区，影响因子, 中科院分区。
LyZ is a plugin for Zotero, which is intended to make working with LyX/Zotero more pleasant.
ChatGPT plugin for Zotero
Helper for managing arXiv papers in Zotero
A Zotero plugin which integrates Inciteful.xyz.
a zotero plugin of changing pdf background color to care your eyes
Zotero plugin for fetching number of citations from Google Scholar.
Customize the displayed authors list
A Zotero plugin adding text to speech (TTS) functionality to various screens
Bionic reading experience with Zotero.
zotxt: a Zotero extension for text
A Zotero plugin to make Todoist tasks for papers added to Zotero
A Zotero add-on for backup and restore preferences, add-ons, translators, styles, and locate between two machines
A zotero plugin to automatically merge duplicate items
从唯问更新影响因子Update IFs from Justscience，其他一系列工具，详见Readme
Keep track of whether you've read items in Zotero

ZotCard is a plug-in for Zotero, which is a card note-taking enhancement tool. It provides card templates (such as concept card, character card, golden sentence card, etc., by default, you can customize other card templates), so you can write cards quickly. In addition, it helps you sort cards and standardize card formats.
Remove attachment(s) when delete the item(s) or collection in Zotero and JurisM.
Download PDF from Sci-Hub automatically For Zotero7
一个基于 PDFFigure2 的 PDF 图表解析插件
A Zotero plugin to remove the broken & duplicate attachment link of the bibliography
Cita: a Wikidata addon for Zotero with citations metadata support
Chart in Zotero

Zotero plugin that links your Markdown database to Zotero. Jump directly from Zotero Items to connected Markdown files. Automatically tags Zotero Items so you can easily see which papers you've made notes for.
zotero-annotation-manage Zotero的笔记整理
Zotero Plugin for OCR
A plugin that does one thing only: Detect and manage duplicate items in Zotero.
scite zotero plugin
Zotero plugin to automatically move attachments and link them
Green Frog https://github.com/redleafnew/zotero-updateifs  的easyScholar数据版。更新影响因子，其他一系列工具，详见Readme
PDF2zh for Zotero | Zotero PDF中文翻译插件
Zotero Add-on Market  | Zotero插件市场 | Browsing, installing, and reviewing plugins within Zotero
Linter for Zotero. A plugin for Zotero to format item metadata. Shortcut to set title rich text; set journal abbreviations, university places, and item languages, etc; detect duplicate items.
Make Zotero's citation in Word easier and clearer.
Zotero extension to retrieve and validate DOIs and shortDOIs
Attachment Manager for Zotero
Preview Zotero attachments in the library view.
Aria is Your AI Research Assistant Powered by GPT Large Language Models
Chat Multiple PDFs in Zotero AI with Gemini, Grok 4, DeepSeek, GPT, ChatGPT, Claude, OpenRouter, Gemma 3, Qwen 3
A Zotero plugin to export item metadata and notes as markdown files
Zotero plugin providing some additional editing features
Night theme for Zotero UI and PDF
Customize your Zotero workflow.
PDF references add-on for Zotero.
A plugin that will automatically download PDFs of zotero items from sci-hub
A Zotero plugin for syncing items and notes into Notion

Zotero plugin to manage your attachments: automatically rename, move, and attach PDFs (or other files) to Zotero items, sync PDFs from your Zotero library to your (mobile) PDF reader (e.g. an iPad, Android tablet, etc.), and extract PDF annotations.
GPT Meet Zotero.
A Zotero add-on to retrive CNKI meta data. 一个简单的Zotero 插件，用于识别中文元数据
Ethereal Style for Zotero
Everything about note management. All in Zotero.
Translate PDF, EPub, webpage, metadata, annotations, notes to the target language. Support 20+ translate services.
